name: praxis
description: The natural scientist's harness for Claude. Domain-agnostic core: a lab of scientist-agents that run the full scientific method over real data — paper reader, domain expert, analyst-coder, skeptic, interpreter, teacher, next-steps planner — plus a typed cache engine with mechanically-enforced integrity (pcache/pbuild/pvalidate) and a fast /init memory-prime. Install a domain pack (praxis-lvk gravitational waves, praxis-pta pulsar timing arrays) to turn it into an expert co-scientist on that field.
